response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack experience and notable teaching/workshop activity, but the role requires a Level II Engineering Manager with 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years building developer tools (compilers, build systems, test automation at scale). The resume shows no formal people-management tenure, no mobile-platform ecosystem ownership, and only tangential developer-tooling work (CI setup, a test runner library, MCP tooling) rather than the build/test infrastructure scope this role demands.
strengths: Deep full-stack engineering background across 15+ years with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Built developer tooling artifacts (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, MCP generators) and ran technical workshops/Selenium courses
Open-source founder of GISCollective demonstrating long-term technical ownership and roadmap thinking
concerns: No explicit people-management role or direct reports listed — fails the 2-year management minimum
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem experience (brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015–2016 only)
Developer-tools experience is adjacent (libraries, CI setup) rather than build systems or test infrastructure at organizational scale

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling exposure (test runner, MCP, CI)
